QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_81

question.text: NPS was extended to all Indian citizens in which year?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** NPS was extended to all Indian citizens in May 2009, allowing voluntary participation beyond government employees. **The Trap:** 2004 was the initial launch for Central Govt employees. 2009 is when it became available to all citizens. **Cross-Exam Context:** Timeline: 2004 (Central Govt) -> 2009 (All Citizens) -> 2011 (Corporate Model) -> 2015 (APY). **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Use the 2009 milestone to show clients that NPS has over 15 years of track record as a market-linked pension scheme.
